author: w3Lb
content: Found during the 2026-06-09 deep review. engine.rs:113 and engine.rs:130 build Change.after as format!("{}\n{content}", cx.line) (and the mirror for InsertBefore), hardcoding LF. The actual file output is correct — lines are rejoined with the detected separator (uses_crlf majority vote) later in apply() — but the before/after metadata surfaced in JSON mode shows LF where a CRLF file will actually get CRLF. Agents consuming the structured diff see misleading bytes. Fix: thread the detected line separator into the LineCtx (or the per-op helpers) and use it when composing the metadata strings; add a CRLF InsertAfter/InsertBefore test asserting the Change.after content matches the real output.
